title: erophila praecox subsp. subnitens
intro: Erophila praecox subsp. subnitens, also known as the early forget-me-not or small forget-me-not, is a small, annual or biennial plant species in the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, as well as reduce inflammation and pain. The health benefits of Erophila praecox subsp. subnitens include its ability to support the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health concerns. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and health benefits.
